name: 📡 Sentiment Auto-Scan
description: Auto-scans crypto news, funding rate, and Fear & Greed on a schedule, and reports a bullish/bearish/neutral sentiment brief with sources.

commands.name: scan-now
commands.desc: Run an on-demand sentiment scan (news + funding + fear&greed) and return the bias brief

commands.name: status
commands.desc: Plugin health: enabled, last scan time, next scheduled scan
